Video.summary: Teresa issues ex-boyfriend Keita an ultimatum: agree to consistent co-parenting or start paying child support.
Video.title: Jefferson vs. Singleton

Video.summary: Imani fights for proof of paternity when Dontel refuses responsibility, demanding DNA before committing to their 1-year-old son.
Video.title: Fann vs. Coleman

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: The Cutlers' compatibility test helps Victor and Keisha settle a dispute over ugly women in the bedroom.
Video.title: Leaks vs. Holley

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Carol is suing her husband for using her money for a bachelor party. Marion argues it was a joint account.
Video.title: The Wedding Thief

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: Christopher is suing his brother Ashlee for punches his tooth out over some spilled juice.
Video.title: My House My Couch

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Edward Grice sues ex-girlfriend Denise Beard for $5,000 after she crashed a car he leased for her, pocketed the insurance payout, and left him to cover repairs. Denise claims the check was stolen and Edward acted on his own to pay for repairs.
Video.title: Insurance Fraud

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: A six-year marriage is on the brink of divorce as Quincy sues husband Jeron for failing to pay the bills.
Video.title: King vs. Johnson

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: Angel sues his proclaimed "frienemy with benefits," Celesta, for six months' unpaid rent.
Video.title: Clark vs. Williams

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: Thirteen years and 20 breakups later, Lakeia and Shundric leave the fate of their relationship up to a compatibility test.
Video.title: White vs. Loyd

Video.summary: A surprise witness and a bombshell reveal blow the lid off Joshua's property-damage claim against girlfriend Tonya.
Video.title: Brown vs. Bell

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: A car sale between coworkers started off sour turned bitter and ended with a sweet old lady.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Darious claims his cousin barged into his car, got caught speeding, borrowed money to go to clubs, and more.
Video.title: On The Road

Video.summary: Two siblings go toe to toe and tell different stories. Reuinted after years apart, the battle begins again.
Video.title: He Said She Said

Video.summary: Plaintiff Tien sues landlord Jeffrey for $2,450, claiming he broke his promise to refund her after she backed out of renting his house. Jeffrey insists he doesn’t owe more, saying he already refunded most of the money and was left covering costs.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: Plaintiff Mumena Boru accuses her ex, Angelo Woodard, of breaking into her apartment, stealing her TV, and taking her phone. Angelo claims the TV is his and countersues for $5,000, alleging wasted time and emotional distress.
Video.title: You Stole My Kids TV

Video.summary: Nancy Moses Hill sues Tracy Jordan for $5,000, claiming Tracy kept too much money from selling her family's antiques. Tracy argues she followed the contract and paid what was due. Nancy insists her elderly mother’s cherished items were undervalued.
Video.title: Antique Ambush

Video.summary: Gloria McPherson sues photographer Aston Watson for $600, claiming he botched her wedding by failing to deliver on services, including a second photographer and an album. Aston defends, blaming her behavior and even her guests' looks.
Video.title: Wedding Photo Fiasco

Video.summary: A man and his wife petition the court for a paternity test because they believe the defendant may be the man's daughter.
Video.title: Long Lost Daughter?

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: Tyrone claims his ex wife Tania got him falsely arrested 3 times so he's here to sue her for $3,000.
Video.title: Reformed Pimp Sues His Madam

Video.summary: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provacatively.
Video.title: Car Sale Gone Sour

Video.summary: A woman hired her friend of 15 years to do her son's and husband's tax returns, but says the friend failed to complete them, so she's suing for a refund.
Video.title: H&R Best Friend

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that, two years ago, her mother confessed that the defendant may be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Are You My Father?

Video.summary: A woman says her former roommate moved out after three months because he wanted more from their relationship than she was willing to give, and she sues him for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Unrequited Rent
